name: Honey Pecan Snaps
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream butter and shortening with sugar until fluffy.
2. Add honey, eggs, and lemon juice; beat well.
3. Combine dry ingredients; gradually add to the creamy mixture. Fold in pecans.
4. Shape into 1-inch balls; roll in sugar.
5. Place on ungreased baking sheets.
6. Bake at 350°F for 12-13 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Cool 2 minutes; remove to wire racks.
